title: Graduate School of Health Sciences Research and Development
content:
Graduate School of Health Sciences Research and Development

Activities and Targets within the Scope of Research and Development (1/2)

The research strategy and goals of our Institute are in line with the 2024-2028 Strategic Plan of our University.

Research Strategy of our Institute:

To increase Research and development resources and efficiency,

To strengthen the culture of science, research, creativity, innovation and entrepreneurship,

To support the process of working and researching together with a high motivation of the faculty members and students within the Institute,

To contribute to technology and universal science by producing new knowledge through researches conducted by considering national priorities,

To produce and disseminate scientific knowledge and make it available to society,

Encouraging academia and stakeholders to transform scientific knowledge into technology and contribute to the national economy,

To ensure the effective use of the Application and Research Centers in graduate thesis and project studies and to inform our students about the centers and their duties,

To enable our students to establish international collaborations and academic partnerships and to encourage academic collaborations.

Activities and Targets within the Scope of Research and Development (2/2)

In line with our university's 2024-2028 Strategic Plan,

BrainPark Technology and Transfer Office

,

Laboratories,

Application and Research Centers

and

Scientific Working Groups

create physical infrastructure and financial resources for research and development activities.

With the

Entrepreneurship Center

established by our University in order to reveal the entrepreneurial side of our faculty members and students; the development of entrepreneurs who contribute to sustainable, value-added, social and economic development in society is encouraged.

Research activities at our university are monitored through the

FTSmart

.

The Scientific Incentive Directive

is operated to improve the competencies of faculty members at our university.
